title: Token Budget Pressure
description: A tight-budget benchmark where selected work exceeds the aggregate input-token budget.
goal: Show token budget blocking while preserving the quality threshold for routed tasks.
expected_constraints: Critical context should fit and be preserved.
Low-value large context should be excluded.
Aggregate token budget should be reported as blocked.
notes: This fixture keeps model quality intact while deliberately exceeding aggregate input tokens.

tasks.title: Inspect large codebase
tasks.description: Inspect a broad repository surface while preserving budget.

tasks.title: Choose validation slice
tasks.description: Select the validation commands that maximize signal under token pressure.

tasks.title: Write budget summary
tasks.description: Summarize what was included, excluded, and why.

context_candidates.content: Do not exceed budget; keep validation signal high.
Recent failures came from skipping the fastest smoke tests.
A long historical release log with many details that may not fit.
